category_sources: Official Scryer Prolog materials describe it as a modern Prolog implementation.
source_facts.description says it is a modern ISO Prolog implementation written mostly in Rust.
display_name_sources: Official homepage and repository use the display name Scryer Prolog.
docs_sources: Official Scryer Prolog homepage and module documentation are first-party documentation surfaces.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo was not re-evaluated per instructions.
tags_sources: Official documentation covers Prolog builtins and libraries.
source_facts.description identifies ISO Prolog and Rust implementation details.
